name: LINtp_FirstFrameIndication
title: LINtp_FirstFrameIndication
syntax: void LINtp_FirstFrameIndication(long sender, long receiver, long announcedLen);
description: Indicates the start of a segmented reception.

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: Address of sender node, or 0 for master.

parameters.name: receiver
parameters.description: Address of receiver node, or 0 for master.

parameters.name: announcedLen
parameters.description: Number of bytes to be expected.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
